mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operation_log_definition ( log_code, log_name, log_type, module_name, description, is_enabled, retention_days, is_del ) VALUES ( #{logCode}, #{logName}, #{logType}, #{moduleName}, #{description}, #{isEnabled}, #{retentionDays}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_operation_log_definition
log_name = #{logName}, log_type = #{logType}, module_name = #{moduleName}, description = #{description}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, retention_days = #{retentionDays}, update_date = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE sys_operation_log_definition SET is_del = 1, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_operation_log_definition SET is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, log_code as logCode, log_name as logName, log_type as logType, module_name as moduleName, description, is_enabled as isEnabled, retention_days as retentionDays, is_del as isDel, create_date as createDate, update_date as updateDate FROM sys_operation_log_definition WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0

SELECT id, log_code as logCode, log_name as logName, log_type as logType, module_name as moduleName, description, is_enabled as isEnabled, retention_days as retentionDays, is_del as isDel, create_date as createDate, update_date as updateDate FROM sys_operation_log_definition WHERE log_code = #{logCode} AND is_del = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_schedule_log_definition ( log_code, log_name, schedule_type, module_name, description, is_enabled, retention_days, is_del ) VALUES ( #{logCode}, #{logName}, #{scheduleType}, #{moduleName}, #{description}, #{isEnabled}, #{retentionDays}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_schedule_log_definition
log_name = #{logName}, schedule_type = #{scheduleType}, module_name = #{moduleName}, description = #{description}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, retention_days = #{retentionDays}, update_date = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE sys_schedule_log_definition SET is_del = 1, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_schedule_log_definition SET is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, log_code as logCode, log_name as logName, schedule_type as scheduleType, module_name as moduleName, description, is_enabled as isEnabled, retention_days as retentionDays, is_del as isDel, create_date as createDate, update_date as updateDate FROM sys_schedule_log_definition WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0

SELECT id, log_code as logCode, log_name as logName, schedule_type as scheduleType, module_name as moduleName, description, is_enabled as isEnabled, retention_days as retentionDays, is_del as isDel, create_date as createDate, update_date as updateDate FROM sys_schedule_log_definition WHERE log_code = #{logCode} AND is_del = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_compute_log_definition ( log_code, log_name, compute_type, module_name, description, is_enabled, retention_days, is_del ) VALUES ( #{logCode}, #{logName}, #{computeType}, #{moduleName}, #{description}, #{isEnabled}, #{retentionDays}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_compute_log_definition
log_name = #{logName}, compute_type = #{computeType}, module_name = #{moduleName}, description = #{description}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, retention_days = #{retentionDays}, update_date = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE sys_compute_log_definition SET is_del = 1, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_compute_log_definition SET is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, log_code as logCode, log_name as logName, compute_type as computeType, module_name as moduleName, description, is_enabled as isEnabled, retention_days as retentionDays, is_del as isDel, create_date as createDate, update_date as updateDate FROM sys_compute_log_definition WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0

SELECT id, log_code as logCode, log_name as logName, compute_type as computeType, module_name as moduleName, description, is_enabled as isEnabled, retention_days as retentionDays, is_del as isDel, create_date as createDate, update_date as updateDate FROM sys_compute_log_definition WHERE log_code = #{logCode} AND is_del = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operation_log ( log_code, user_id, user_name, organ_id, organ_name, operation_type, operation_module, operation_desc, request_method, request_url, request_params, response_result, ip_address, status, error_msg, execution_time, is_del ) VALUES ( #{logCode}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{organId}, #{organName}, #{operationType}, #{operationModule}, #{operationDesc}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestUrl}, #{requestParams}, #{responseResult}, #{ipAddress}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{executionTime}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT id, log_code as logCode, user_id as userId, user_name as userName, organ_id as organId, organ_name as organName, operation_type as operationType, operation_module as operationModule, operation_desc as operationDesc, request_method as requestMethod, request_url as requestUrl, request_params as requestParams, response_result as responseResult, ip_address as ipAddress, status, error_msg as errorMsg, execution_time as executionTime, is_del as isDel, create_date as createDate FROM sys_operation_log WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_schedule_log ( log_code, schedule_name, schedule_type, schedule_cron, execute_server, start_time, end_time, execution_time, status, result_message, error_msg, retry_count, is_del ) VALUES ( #{logCode}, #{scheduleName}, #{scheduleType}, #{scheduleCron}, #{executeServer}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{executionTime}, #{status}, #{resultMessage}, #{errorMsg}, #{retryCount}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT id, log_code as logCode, schedule_name as scheduleName, schedule_type as scheduleType, schedule_cron as scheduleCron, execute_server as executeServer, start_time as startTime, end_time as endTime, execution_time as executionTime, status, result_message as resultMessage, error_msg as errorMsg, retry_count as retryCount, is_del as isDel, create_date as createDate FROM sys_schedule_log WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_compute_log ( log_code, task_id, task_name, compute_type, project_id, project_name, user_id, user_name, organ_id, organ_name, start_time, end_time, execution_time, status, result_data, error_msg, resource_usage, is_del ) VALUES ( #{logCode}, #{taskId}, #{taskName}, #{computeType}, #{projectId}, #{projectName}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{organId}, #{organName}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{executionTime}, #{status}, #{resultData}, #{errorMsg}, #{resourceUsage}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT id, log_code as logCode, task_id as taskId, task_name as taskName, compute_type as computeType, project_id as projectId, project_name as projectName, user_id as userId, user_name as userName, organ_id as organId, organ_name as organName, start_time as startTime, end_time as endTime, execution_time as executionTime, status, result_data as resultData, error_msg as errorMsg, resource_usage as resourceUsage, is_del as isDel, create_date as createDate FROM sys_compute_log WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0

SELECT id, log_code as logCode, task_id as taskId, task_name as taskName, compute_type as computeType, project_id as projectId, project_name as projectName, user_id as userId, user_name as userName, organ_id as organId, organ_name as organName, start_time as startTime, end_time as endTime, execution_time as executionTime, status, result_data as resultData, error_msg as errorMsg, resource_usage as resourceUsage, is_del as isDel, create_date as createDate FROM sys_compute_log WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY create_date DESC LIMIT 1
